_description: Ratchet — floor/max values enforced by check-ratchet.js in CI.

testCount.note: v7.4.4 Buchführung floor — measured baseline 5583 on Windows (full test:ci, v7.4.3 codebase). Floor set 1 below measured value, matching the 1-test safety buffer convention from v7.4.2.

fitnessScore.note: Architectural fitness score from audit:fitness. The 3-point gap is the binary File-Size-Guard penalty (any warn → 7/10). Currently warning: EpisodicMemory.js (~759 LOC, deferred per O-8 — no driving feature touch yet) and PromptBuilderSections.js (~770 LOC, deferred per O-12 — bundled with BeliefStore reorg in v7.6+). Splits in v7.4.3 (Container, IntentRouter, SelfModificationPipeline) brought four files under threshold; the score did not move because two warnings still remain.

schemaMismatches.note: scan-schemas.js must report 0. Runtime event payloads must match declared schemas. v7.4.3 scanner: 415/415 events covered, 0 mismatches.

schemaMissing.note: audit-schemas.js missing check — catalog entries without schema registrations.

schemaOrphan.note: audit-schemas.js orphan check — schemas without catalog entries.

brokenLinks.note: Internal docs/ links must all resolve.
